name: claude-git-sync-hooks
description: Hooks configuration for Claude Code to enable Git-Chat synchronization without restarting

PreToolUse.description: Save current branch before any Bash command (to detect branch switches)

PostToolUse.description: Detect branch switches and inject previous chat context automatically

UserPromptSubmit.description: Auto-save chat state after each user message

onToolCall.description: [Legacy] Detect Git branch switches via Bash tool

onSessionStart.description: [Legacy] Load chat state when Claude Code starts

onUserPromptSubmit.description: [Legacy] Auto-save chat state after user messages
